sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67348" key="mhkiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μηκικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μῆκος</etym>) <sense id="n67348.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in longitude</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μετάβασις, θέσις</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:5:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.6</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
